scripts.watch: pzstudio clean && pzstudio build && pzstudio watch
scripts.generate:poster: mkdir images 2>nul & magick -size 512x512 xc:"#121212" -stroke "#FFD400" -strokewidth 4 -fill none -draw "rectangle 2,2 510,510" -gravity center -font Arial -fill "#FFD400" -pointsize 120 -annotate +0-40 "{ ZUL }" -stroke none -fill "#D6D6D6" -pointsize 32 -annotate +0+70 "Zomboid Unified Logging" -strip -alpha off -depth 8 PNG24:images/poster.png
scripts.generate:preview: magick images/poster.png -resize 256x256 -filter Lanczos -define filter:blur=0.9 -strip -alpha off -depth 8 PNG24:images/preview.png
scripts.generate:icon: magick images/poster.png -resize 32x32 -filter Lanczos -define filter:blur=1.2 -strip -alpha off -depth 8 PNG24:images/icon.png
